findings.evidence: PR line 138 proves it by `exact Finset.le_sup hi`; Mathlib has `theorem le_sup {b : β} (hb : b ∈ s) : f b ≤ s.sup f` at `Mathlib/Data/Finset/Lattice/Fold.lean:118`.
findings.fix: Remove this declaration and use `Finset.le_sup hi` at call sites.
findings.issue: `Subcoalgebra.le_finset_sup` is an exact namespace wrapper around existing `Finset.le_sup`.

findings.evidence: PR line 145 proves it by `exact Finset.sup_le hD`; Mathlib exposes `Finset.sup_le` via the protected alias at `Mathlib/Data/Finset/Lattice/Fold.lean:106`.
findings.fix: Remove this declaration and use `Finset.sup_le hD` at call sites.
findings.issue: `Subcoalgebra.finset_sup_le` is an exact namespace wrapper around existing `Finset.sup_le`.

summary: The substantive subcoalgebra join bridge is not duplicated, but the PR adds finite-join order aliases that are directly replaced by existing Mathlib `Finset` lattice API.
